zh.Chelmsford, Essex, England: 英國艾可傑爾姆斯福德
zh.Danbury, Essex, England: 英國英格蘭艾可丹波瑞
zh.Danbury, , Essex, England: 英國英格蘭艾可丹波瑞
zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Darcy於大約1500年出生在英國英格蘭艾可丹波瑞時，她的父親Lord Robert Darcy van Little Malden III23歲，母親Elizabeth Wentworth25歲。她於1530年與Sir Richard Southwell在英國英格蘭艾可丹波瑞結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1558年8月7日在英國艾可享年59歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Darcy于大约1500年出生在英国英格兰艾可丹波瑞时，她的父亲Lord Robert Darcy van Little Malden III23岁，母亲Elizabeth Wentworth25岁。她于1530年与Sir Richard Southwell在英国英格兰艾可丹波瑞结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于1558年8月7日在英国艾可享年59岁。

nameMeanings.name: Darcy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Eamon, Brendan, Eamonn, Maeve, Malachy, Niamh, Seamus.  French Gisele, Julien, Normand, Alain, Armand, Cecile, Clemence, Dominique, Emile, Gilles, Jean-Paul, Laure.
English (Lancashire) and Irish: of Norman origin, a habitational name from Arcy in Manche, France, with fused preposition d(e) ‘from’.

Irish: in Ireland, this is generally the Norman name (see 1 above), established in Meath by Sir William D'Arcy in the 1360s, but it was also adopted for Ó Dorchaidhe ‘descendant of the dark one’, from dorcha ‘dark, gloomy’, a Connacht name that fell together with the Norman surname, which was introduced by Sir William D'Arcy and Sir John D'Arcy, Chief Justiciar of Ireland in the 14th century.

variants.name: Darcey
meanings: English (of Norman origin) and Irish (Tipperary): variant of   Darcy  .

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Darcy was born about 1500, in Danbury, Essex, England, United Kingdom, her father, Lord Robert Darcy van Little Malden III, was 23 and her mother, Elizabeth Wentworth, was 25. She married Sir Richard Southwell in 1530, in Danbury, Essex, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died on 7 August 1558, in Essex, England, at the age of 59.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Darcy est née environ 1500, à Danbury, Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Lord Robert Darcy van Little Malden III, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Wentworth, avait 25 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Richard Southwell en 1530, à Danbury, Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée le 7 août 1558, à Essex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 59 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Darcy um 1500 in Danbury, Essex, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Lord Robert Darcy van Little Malden III 23 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth Wentworth 25. Sie hat 1530 in Danbury, Essex, England, United Kingdom Sir Richard Southwell geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb am 7. August 1558 im Alter von 59 Jahren in Essex, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Darcy è nata il circa 1500 nel Danbury, Essex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Lord Robert Darcy van Little Malden III, aveva 23 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth Wentworth, aveva 25 anni. Lei sposato Sir Richard Southwell nel 1530, nel Danbury, Essex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì il 7 agosto 1558, nel Essex, England, all'età di 59 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Darcyが約1500年にイギリスイギリスエセックスダンブリーで生まれた時，父Lord Robert Darcy van Little Malden IIIは23歳，母Elizabeth Wentworthは25歳であった。1530年にイギリスイギリスエセックスダンブリーでSir Richard Southwellと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1558年8月7日にイギリスエセックスで59歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Darcy(이)가 대략 1500년 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 단아버이에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Lord Robert Darcy van Little Malden III(은)는 23세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Wentworth(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 1530년 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 단아버이에서 Sir Richard Southwell(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1558년 8월 7일 영국 에세스에서 59세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Darcy nasceu aproximadamente 1500, em Danbury, Essex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Lord Robert Darcy van Little Malden III, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Wentworth, tinha 25 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Richard Southwell em 1530, em Danbury, Essex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ela faleceu em 7 de agosto de 1558, em Essex, Inglaterra, com 59 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Darcy родилась около 1500 г. в местности данбури, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Lord Robert Darcy van Little Malden III было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Wentworth, 25. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Richard Southwell в 1530 г. в местности данбури, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла 7 августа 1558 г. в местности эссекс, Англия в возрасте 59 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elizabeth Darcy nació aproximadamente 1500, en Danbury, Essex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Lord Robert Darcy van Little Malden III, tenía 23 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Wentworth, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Sir Richard Southwell en 1530, en Danbury, Essex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió el 7 de agosto de 1558, en Essex, Inglaterra, a la edad de 59 años.
